title: Vaadin 25.2: Build UIs in plain language, and call the browser from Java
abstract: Vaadin 25.2: Build UIs in plain language, and call the browser from Java may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools ofte...
abstract_zh: VAADIN 25.2：用大白话建界面，让浏览器听Java的指挥？听着冷门，但它就是精准高效！在这AI泛滥的时代，找到这么一个专精的小工具，就像是在代码海洋里发现了一片未经污染的净土。
